API Reference
    Introduction
    • Introduction
    • Authentication
    application
    • GETReturn all applications.
    • POSTCreate an application.
    • PUTUpdate an application.
    • DELDelete an application.
    • POSTUpload an image for an application.
    • DELDeletes an image of an application.
    message
    • GETReturn all messages from a specific application.
    • DELDelete all messages from a specific application.
    • GETReturn all messages.
    • POSTCreate a message.
    • DELDelete all messages.
    • DELDeletes a message with an id.
    • GETWebsocket, return newly created messages.
    auth
    • POSTAuthenticate via basic auth and create a session.
    • POSTEnd the current session.
    oidc
    • GETHandle the OIDC provider callback (browser).
    • GETStart the OIDC flow to elevate an existing client session (browser).
    • POSTInitiate the OIDC authorization flow for a native app.
    • POSTExchange an authorization code for a gotify client token.
    • GETStart the OIDC login flow (browser).
    client
    • GETReturn all clients.
    • POSTCreate a client.
    • PUTUpdate a client.
    • DELDelete a client.
    • POSTElevate a client session.
    user
    • GETReturn the current user.
    • POSTUpdate the password of the current user.
    • GETReturn all users.
    • POSTCreate a user.
    • GETGet a user.
    • POSTUpdate a user.
    • DELDeletes a user.
    info
    • GETGet gotify information.
    • GETGet health information.
    • GETGet version information.
    plugin
    • GETReturn all plugins.
    • GETGet YAML configuration for Configurer plugin.
    • POSTUpdate YAML configuration for Configurer plugin.
    • POSTDisable a plugin.
    • GETGet display info for a Displayer plugin.
    • POSTEnable a plugin.

    Gotify REST-API.

    v2.1.0
    Base URLs
    http://localhost
    https://localhost

    This is the documentation of the Gotify REST-API.

    Authentication

    In Gotify there are two token types: clientToken: a client is something that receives message and manages stuff like creating new tokens or delete messages. (f.ex this token should be used for an android app) appToken: an application is something that sends messages (f.ex. this token should be used for a shell script)

    The token can be transmitted in a header named X-Gotify-Key, in a query parameter named token or through a header named Authorization with the value prefixed with Bearer (Ex. Bearer randomtoken). There is also the possibility to authenticate through basic auth, this should only be used for creating a clientToken.

    ---

    Found a bug or have some questions? Create an issue on GitHub

    Authentication

    appTokenAuthorizationHeaderapiKey

    Enter an application token with the Bearer prefix, e.g. Bearer Axxxxxxxxxx.

    API Key: Authorization in header

    appTokenHeaderapiKey

    API Key: X-Gotify-Key in header

    appTokenQueryapiKey

    API Key: token in query

    basicAuthhttp

    Scheme: basic

    clientTokenAuthorizationHeaderapiKey

    Enter a client token with the Bearer prefix, e.g. Bearer Cxxxxxxxxxx.

    API Key: Authorization in header

    clientTokenHeaderapiKey

    API Key: X-Gotify-Key in header

    clientTokenQueryapiKey

    API Key: token in query

    application

    Return all applications.

    GET
    http://localhost/application

    Response

    200OKArray<Application>

    Ok

    401UnauthorizedError

    Unauthorized

    403ForbiddenError

    Forbidden

    Authorization

    clientTokenAuthorizationHeaderapiKey in header

    Enter a client token with the Bearer prefix, e.g. Bearer Cxxxxxxxxxx.

    clientTokenHeaderapiKey in header
    clientTokenQueryapiKey in query
    basicAuthhttp (basic)
    Return all applications.
    Copy
    curl -X GET 'http://localhost/application'
    const response = await fetch('http://localhost/application', {
  method: 'GET',
});

const data = await response.json();
    import requests

response = requests.get('http://localhost/application')
data = response.json()
    Copy
    [
  {
    "createdAt": "2019-01-01T00:00:00Z",
    "defaultPriority": 4,
    "description": "Backup server for the interwebs",
    "id": 5,
    "image": "image/image.jpeg",
    "internal": false,
    "lastUsed": "2019-01-01T00:00:00Z",
    "name": "Backup Server",
    "sortKey": "a1",
    "token": "AWH0wZ5r0Mbac.r"
  }
]
    {
  "error": "Unauthorized",
  "errorCode": 401,
  "errorDescription": "you need to provide a valid access token or user credentials to access this api"
}
    {
  "error": "Unauthorized",
  "errorCode": 401,
  "errorDescription": "you need to provide a valid access token or user credentials to access this api"
}
    Return all applications.
    Copy
    curl -X GET 'http://localhost/application'
    const response = await fetch('http://localhost/application', {
  method: 'GET',
});

const data = await response.json();
    import requests

response = requests.get('http://localhost/application')
data = response.json()
    Copy
    [
  {
    "createdAt": "2019-01-01T00:00:00Z",
    "defaultPriority": 4,
    "description": "Backup server for the interwebs",
    "id": 5,
    "image": "image/image.jpeg",
    "internal": false,
    "lastUsed": "2019-01-01T00:00:00Z",
    "name": "Backup Server",
    "sortKey": "a1",
    "token": "AWH0wZ5r0Mbac.r"
  }
]
    {
  "error": "Unauthorized",
  "errorCode": 401,
  "errorDescription": "you need to provide a valid access token or user credentials to access this api"
}
    {
  "error": "Unauthorized",
  "errorCode": 401,
  "errorDescription": "you need to provide a valid access token or user credentials to access this api"
}

    Create an application.

    POST
    http://localhost/application

    Body

    application/json

    the application to add

    Params allowed to create or update Applications.

    defaultPriorityinteger<int64>

    The default priority of messages sent by this application. Defaults to 0.

    descriptionstring

    The description of the application.

    namestringrequired

    The application name. This is how the application should be displayed to the user.

    sortKeystring

    The sortKey for the application. Uses fractional indexing.

    Response

    200OKApplication

    Ok

    400Bad RequestError

    Bad Request

    401UnauthorizedError

    Unauthorized

    403ForbiddenError

    Forbidden

    Authorization

    clientTokenAuthorizationHeaderapiKey in header

    Enter a client token with the Bearer prefix, e.g. Bearer Cxxxxxxxxxx.

    clientTokenHeaderapiKey in header
    clientTokenQueryapiKey in query
    basicAuthhttp (basic)
    Create an application.
    Copy
    curl -X POST 'http://localhost/application' \
  -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \
  -d '{
    "defaultPriority": 5,
    "description": "Backup server for the interwebs",
    "name": "Backup Server",
    "sortKey": "a1"
  }'
    const response = await fetch('http://localhost/application', {
  method: 'POST',
  headers: {
    'Content-Type': 'application/json',
  },
  body: JSON.stringify({
      "defaultPriority": 5,
      "description": "Backup server for the interwebs",
      "name": "Backup Server",
      "sortKey": "a1"
    }),
});

const data = await response.json();
    import requests

payload = {
  "defaultPriority": 5,
  "description": "Backup server for the interwebs",
  "name": "Backup Server",
  "sortKey": "a1"
}

response = requests.post('http://localhost/application', json=payload)
data = response.json()
    Request Body
    Copy
    {
  "defaultPriority": 5,
  "description": "Backup server for the interwebs",
  "name": "Backup Server",
  "sortKey": "a1"
}
    Copy
    {
  "createdAt": "2019-01-01T00:00:00Z",
  "defaultPriority": 4,
  "description": "Backup server for the interwebs",
  "id": 5,
  "image": "image/image.jpeg",
  "internal": false,
  "lastUsed": "2019-01-01T00:00:00Z",
  "name": "Backup Server",
  "sortKey": "a1",
  "token": "AWH0wZ5r0Mbac.r"
}
    {
  "error": "Unauthorized",
  "errorCode": 401,
  "errorDescription": "you need to provide a valid access token or user credentials to access this api"
}
    {
  "error": "Unauthorized",
  "errorCode": 401,
  "errorDescription": "you need to provide a valid access token or user credentials to access this api"
}
    {
  "error": "Unauthorized",
  "errorCode": 401,
  "errorDescription": "you need to provide a valid access token or user credentials to access this api"
}

    Update an application.

    PUT
    http://localhost/application/{id}

    Body

    application/json

    the application to update

    Params allowed to create or update Applications.

    defaultPriorityinteger<int64>

    The default priority of messages sent by this application. Defaults to 0.

    descriptionstring

    The description of the application.

    namestringrequired

    The application name. This is how the application should be displayed to the user.

    sortKeystring

    The sortKey for the application. Uses fractional indexing.

    Parameters

    idinteger<int64>requiredpath

    the application id

    Response

    200OKApplication

    Ok

    400Bad RequestError

    Bad Request

    401UnauthorizedError

    Unauthorized

    403ForbiddenError

    Forbidden

    404Not FoundError

    Not Found

    Authorization

    clientTokenAuthorizationHeaderapiKey in header

    Enter a client token with the Bearer prefix, e.g. Bearer Cxxxxxxxxxx.

    clientTokenHeaderapiKey in header
    clientTokenQueryapiKey in query
    basicAuthhttp (basic)
    Update an application.
    Copy
    curl -X PUT 'http://localhost/application/{id}' \
  -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \
  -d '{
    "defaultPriority": 5,
    "description": "Backup server for the interwebs",
    "name": "Backup Server",
    "sortKey": "a1"
  }'
    const response = await fetch('http://localhost/application/{id}', {
  method: 'PUT',
  headers: {
    'Content-Type': 'application/json',
  },
  body: JSON.stringify({
      "defaultPriority": 5,
      "description": "Backup server for the interwebs",
      "name": "Backup Server",
      "sortKey": "a1"
    }),
});

const data = await response.json();
    import requests

payload = {
  "defaultPriority": 5,
  "description": "Backup server for the interwebs",
  "name": "Backup Server",
  "sortKey": "a1"
}

response = requests.put('http://localhost/application/{id}', json=payload)
data = response.json()

  "sortKey": "a1"

    Delete an application.

    DELETE
    http://localhost/application/{id}

    Requires elevated authentication.

    Parameters

    idinteger<int64>requiredpath

    the application id

    Response

    200OK

    Ok

    400Bad RequestError

    Bad Request

    401UnauthorizedError

    Unauthorized

    403ForbiddenError

    Forbidden

    404Not FoundError

    Not Found

    Authorization

    clientTokenAuthorizationHeaderapiKey in header

    Enter a client token with the Bearer prefix, e.g. Bearer Cxxxxxxxxxx.

    clientTokenHeaderapiKey in header
    clientTokenQueryapiKey in query
    basicAuthhttp (basic)
    Delete an application.
    Copy
    curl -X DELETE 'http://localhost/application/{id}'
    const response = await fetch('http://localhost/application/{id}', {
  method: 'DELETE',
});

const data = await response.json();
    import requests

response = requests.delete('http://localhost/application/{id}')
data = response.json()
    Copy
    {
  "error": "Unauthorized",
  "errorCode": 401,
  "errorDescription": "you need to provide a valid access token or user credentials to access this api"
}
    {
  "error": "Unauthorized",
  "errorCode": 401,
  "errorDescription": "you need to provide a valid access token or user credentials to access this api"
}
    {

}

  "error": "Unauthorized",
  "errorCode": 401,
  "errorDescription": "you need to provide a valid access token or user credentials to access this api"
}

    const response = await fetch('http://localhost/application/{id}', {

    Upload an image for an application.

    POST
    http://localhost/application/{id}/image

    Body

    multipart/form-data
    filestring<binary>required

    the application image

    Parameters

    idinteger<int64>requiredpath

    the application id

    Response

    200OKApplication

    Ok

    400Bad RequestError

    Bad Request

    401UnauthorizedError

    Unauthorized

    403ForbiddenError

    Forbidden

    404Not FoundError

    Not Found

    500Internal Server ErrorError

    Server Error

    Authorization

    clientTokenAuthorizationHeaderapiKey in header

    Enter a client token with the Bearer prefix, e.g. Bearer Cxxxxxxxxxx.

    clientTokenHeaderapiKey in header
    clientTokenQueryapiKey in query
    basicAuthhttp (basic)
    Upload an image for an application.
    Copy
    curl -X POST 'http://localhost/application/{id}/image' \
  -H 'Content-Type: multipart/form-data' \
  -d '{
    "file": "<binary>"
  }'
    const response = await fetch('http://localhost/application/{id}/image', {
  method: 'POST',
  headers: {
    'Content-Type': 'multipart/form-data',
  },
  body: JSON.stringify({
      "file": "<binary>"
    }),
});

const data = await response.json();
    import requests

payload = {
  "file": "<binary>"
}

response = requests.post('http://localhost/application/{id}/image', json=payload)
data = response.json()
    Request Body
    Copy
    {
  "file": "<binary>"
}
    Copy
    {
  "createdAt": "2019-01-01T00:00:00Z",
  "defaultPriority": 4,
  "description": "Backup server for the interwebs",
  "id": 5,
  "image": "image/image.jpeg",
  "internal": false,
  "lastUsed": "2019-01-01T00:00:00Z",
  "name": "Backup Server",
  "sortKey": "a1",
  "token": "AWH0wZ5r0Mbac.r"
}
    {
  "error": "Unauthorized",
  "errorCode": 401,
  "errorDescription": "you need to provide a valid access token or user credentials to access this api"
}

    Deletes an image of an application.

    DELETE
    http://localhost/application/{id}/image

    Parameters

    idinteger<int64>requiredpath

    the application id

    Response

    200OK

    Ok

    400Bad RequestError

    Bad Request

    401UnauthorizedError

    Unauthorized

    403ForbiddenError

    Forbidden

    404Not FoundError

    Not Found

    500Internal Server ErrorError

    Server Error

    Authorization

    clientTokenAuthorizationHeaderapiKey in header

    Enter a client token with the Bearer prefix, e.g. Bearer Cxxxxxxxxxx.

    clientTokenHeaderapiKey in header
    clientTokenQueryapiKey in query
    basicAuthhttp (basic)
    Deletes an image of an application.
    Copy
    curl -X DELETE 'http://localhost/application/{id}/image'
    const response = await fetch('http://localhost/application/{id}/image', {
  method: 'DELETE',
});

const data = await response.json();
    import requests

response = requests.delete('http://localhost/application/{id}/image')
data = response.json()

    message

    Return all messages from a specific application.

    GET
    http://localhost/application/{id}/message

    Parameters

    idinteger<int64>requiredpath

    the application id

    limitinteger[1, 200]100query

    the maximal amount of messages to return

    sinceinteger<int64>>= 0query

    return all messages with an ID less than this value

    Response

    200OKPagedMessages

    Ok

    400Bad RequestError

    Bad Request

    401UnauthorizedError

    Unauthorized

    403ForbiddenError

    Forbidden

    404Not FoundError

    Not Found

    Authorization

    clientTokenAuthorizationHeaderapiKey in header

    Enter a client token with the Bearer prefix, e.g. Bearer Cxxxxxxxxxx.

    clientTokenHeaderapiKey in header
    clientTokenQueryapiKey in query
    basicAuthhttp (basic)
    Return all messages from a specific application.
    Copy
    curl -X GET 'http://localhost/application/{id}/message'
    const response = await fetch('http://localhost/application/{id}/message', {
  method: 'GET',
});

const data = await response.json();
    import requests

response = requests.get('http://localhost/application/{id}/message')
data = response.json()
    Copy
    {
  "messages": [
    {
      "appid": 5,
      "date": "2018-02-27T19:36:10.5045044+01:00",
      "extras": {
        "home::appliances::lighting::on": {
          "brightness": 15
        },
        "home::appliances::thermostat::change_temperature": {
          "temperature": 23
        }
      },
      "id": 25,
      "message": "**Backup** was successfully finished.",
      "priority": 2,
      "title": "Backup"
    }
  ],
  "paging": {
    "limit": 123,
    "next": "http://example.com/message?limit=50&since=123456",
    "since": 5,
    "size": 5
  }
}
    {
  "error": "Unauthorized",
  "errorCode": 401,
  "errorDescription": "you need to provide a valid access token or user credentials to access this api"
}

  "error": "Unauthorized",
  "errorCode": 401,
  "errorDescription": "you need to provide a valid access token or user credentials to access this api"
}

    {
  "error": "Unauthorized",
  "errorCode": 401,
  "errorDescription": "you need to provide a valid access token or user credentials to access this api"
}

    Create a message.

    POST
    http://localhost/message

    NOTE: When authenticating with a client token or basic auth, the request body must include "appid" referencing an application owned by the authenticated user. When authenticating with an application token, the application is derived from the token and any "appid" in the body is ignored.

    Body

    application/json

    the message to add

    The MessageExternal holds information about a message which was sent by an Application.

    appidinteger<int64>requiredread only

    The application id that send this message.

    datestring<date-time>requiredread only

    The date the message was created.

    extrasobject

    The extra data sent along the message.

    The extra fields are stored in a key-value scheme. Only accepted in CreateMessage requests with application/json content-type.

    The keys should be in the following format: <top-namespace>::[<sub-namespace>::]<action>

    These namespaces are reserved and might be used in the official clients: gotify android ios web server client. Do not use them for other purposes.

    idinteger<int64>requiredread only

    The message id.

    messagestringrequired

    The message. Markdown (excluding html) is allowed.

    priorityinteger<int64>

    The priority of the message. If unset, then the default priority of the application will be used.

    titlestring

    The title of the message.

    Response

    200OKMessage

    Ok

    400Bad RequestError

    Bad Request

    401UnauthorizedError

    Unauthorized

    403ForbiddenError

    Forbidden

    Authorization

    appTokenAuthorizationHeaderapiKey in header

    Enter an application token with the Bearer prefix, e.g. Bearer Axxxxxxxxxx.

    appTokenHeaderapiKey in header
    appTokenQueryapiKey in query
    clientTokenAuthorizationHeaderapiKey in header

    Enter a client token with the Bearer prefix, e.g. Bearer Cxxxxxxxxxx.

    clientTokenHeaderapiKey in header
    clientTokenQueryapiKey in query
    basicAuthhttp (basic)
    Create a message.
    Copy
    curl -X POST 'http://localhost/message' \
  -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \
  -d '{
    "appid": 5,
    "date": "2018-02-27T19:36:10.5045044+01:00",
    "extras": {
      "home::appliances::lighting::on": {
        "brightness": 15
      },
      "home::appliances::thermostat::change_temperature": {
        "temperature": 23
      }
    },
    "id": 25,
    "message": "**Backup** was successfully finished.",
    "priority": 2,
    "title": "Backup"
  }'
    const response = await fetch('http://localhost/message', {
  method: 'POST',
  headers: {
    'Content-Type': 'application/json',
  },
  body: JSON.stringify({
      "appid": 5,
      "date": "2018-02-27T19:36:10.5045044+01:00",
      "extras": {
        "home::appliances::lighting::on": {
          "brightness": 15
        },
        "home::appliances::thermostat::change_temperature": {
          "temperature": 23
        }
      },
      "id": 25,
      "message": "**Backup** was successfully finished.",
      "priority": 2,
      "title": "Backup"
    }),
});

const data = await response.json();
    import requests

payload = {
  "appid": 5,
  "date": "2018-02-27T19:36:10.5045044+01:00",
  "extras": {
    "home::appliances::lighting::on": {
      "brightness": 15
    },
    "home::appliances::thermostat::change_temperature": {
      "temperature": 23
    }
  },
  "id": 25,
  "message": "**Backup** was successfully finished.",
  "priority": 2,
  "title": "Backup"
}

response = requests.post('http://localhost/message', json=payload)
data = response.json()

    Copy
    {
  "appid": 5,
  "date": "2018-02-27T19:36:10.5045044+01:00",
  "extras": {
    "home::appliances::lighting::on": {
      "brightness": 15
    },
    "home::appliances::thermostat::change_temperature": {
      "temperature": 23
    }
  },
  "id": 25,
  "message": "**Backup** was successfully finished.",
  "priority": 2,
  "title": "Backup"
}

    Websocket, return newly created messages.

    GET
    http://localhost/stream

    Response

    200OKMessage

    Ok

    400Bad RequestError

    Bad Request

    401UnauthorizedError

    Unauthorized

    403ForbiddenError

    Forbidden

    500Internal Server ErrorError

    Server Error

    Authorization

    clientTokenAuthorizationHeaderapiKey in header

    Enter a client token with the Bearer prefix, e.g. Bearer Cxxxxxxxxxx.

    clientTokenHeaderapiKey in header
    clientTokenQueryapiKey in query
    basicAuthhttp (basic)
    Websocket, return newly created messages.
    Copy
    curl -X GET 'http://localhost/stream'
    const response = await fetch('http://localhost/stream', {
  method: 'GET',
});

const data = await response.json();
    import requests

response = requests.get('http://localhost/stream')
data = response.json()
    Copy
    {
  "appid": 5,
  "date": "2018-02-27T19:36:10.5045044+01:00",
  "extras": {
    "home::appliances::lighting::on": {
      "brightness": 15
    },
    "home::appliances::thermostat::change_temperature": {
      "temperature": 23
    }
  },
  "id": 25,
  "message": "**Backup** was successfully finished.",
  "priority": 2,
  "title": "Backup"
}
    {
  "error": "Unauthorized",
  "errorCode": 401,
  "errorDescription": "you need to provide a valid access token or user credentials to access this api"
}
    {
  "error": "Unauthorized",
  "errorCode": 401,
  "errorDescription": "you need to provide a valid access token or user credentials to access this api"
}

  "error": "Unauthorized",
  "errorCode": 401,
  "errorDescription": "you need to provide a valid access token or user credentials to access this api"
}
    {
  "error": "Unauthorized",
  "errorCode": 401,
  "errorDescription": "you need to provide a valid access token or user credentials to access this api"
}

    const response = await fetch('http://localhost/stream', {
  method: 'GET',
});

const data = await response.json();

    auth

    Authenticate via basic auth and create a session.

    POST
    http://localhost/auth/local/login

    Body

    application/x-www-form-urlencoded
    namestringrequired

    the client name to create

    Response

    200OKCurrentUser

    Ok

    401UnauthorizedError

    Unauthorized

    Authorization

    basicAuthhttp (basic)
    Authenticate via basic auth and create a session.
    Copy
    curl -X POST 'http://localhost/auth/local/login' \
  -H 'Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded' \
  -d '{
    "name": "string"
  }'
    const response = await fetch('http://localhost/auth/local/login', {
  method: 'POST',
  headers: {
    'Content-Type': 'application/x-www-form-urlencoded',
  },
  body: JSON.stringify({
      "name": "string"
    }),
});

const data = await response.json();
    import requests

payload = {
  "name": "string"
}

response = requests.post('http://localhost/auth/local/login', json=payload)
data = response.json()
    Request Body
    Copy
    {
  "name": "string"
}
    Copy
    {
  "admin": true,
  "clientId": 5,
  "createdAt": "2019-01-01T00:00:00Z",
  "elevatedUntil": "2024-01-15T09:30:00Z",
  "id": 25,
  "name": "unicorn"
}
    {
  "error": "Unauthorized",
  "errorCode": 401,
  "errorDescription": "you need to provide a valid access token or user credentials to access this api"
}
    Authenticate via basic auth and create a session.
    Copy
    curl -X POST 'http://localhost/auth/local/login' \
  -H 'Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded' \
  -d '{
    "name": "string"
  }'
    const response = await fetch('http://localhost/auth/local/login', {
  method: 'POST',
  headers: {
    'Content-Type': 'application/x-www-form-urlencoded',
  },
  body: JSON.stringify({
      "name": "string"
    }),
});

const data = await response.json();
    import requests

payload = {
  "name": "string"
}

response = requests.post('http://localhost/auth/local/login', json=payload)
data = response.json()
    Request Body
    Copy
    {
  "name": "string"
}
    Copy
    {
  "admin": true,
  "clientId": 5,
  "createdAt": "2019-01-01T00:00:00Z",
  "elevatedUntil": "2024-01-15T09:30:00Z",
  "id": 25,
  "name": "unicorn"
}
    {
  "error": "Unauthorized",
  "errorCode": 401,
  "errorDescription": "you need to provide a valid access token or user credentials to access this api"
}

    End the current session.

    POST
    http://localhost/auth/logout

    Clears the session cookie and deletes the associated client.

    Response

    200OK

    Ok

    400Bad RequestError

    Bad Request

    Authorization

    clientTokenHeaderapiKey in header
    clientTokenQueryapiKey in query
    basicAuthhttp (basic)
    End the current session.
    Copy
    curl -X POST 'http://localhost/auth/logout'
    const response = await fetch('http://localhost/auth/logout', {
  method: 'POST',
});

const data = await response.json();
    import requests

response = requests.post('http://localhost/auth/logout')
data = response.json()
    400
    Copy
    {
  "error": "Unauthorized",
  "errorCode": 401,
  "errorDescription": "you need to provide a valid access token or user credentials to access this api"
}
    End the current session.
    Copy
    curl -X POST 'http://localhost/auth/logout'
    const response = await fetch('http://localhost/auth/logout', {
  method: 'POST',
});

const data = await response.json();
    import requests

response = requests.post('http://localhost/auth/logout')
data = response.json()
    400
    Copy
    {
  "error": "Unauthorized",
  "errorCode": 401,
  "errorDescription": "you need to provide a valid access token or user credentials to access this api"
}

    oidc

    Handle the OIDC provider callback (browser).

    GET
    http://localhost/auth/oidc/callback

    Exchanges the authorization code for tokens, resolves the user, creates a gotify client, sets a session cookie, and redirects to the UI.

    Parameters

    codestringrequiredquery

    the authorization code from the OIDC provider

    statestringrequiredquery

    the state parameter for CSRF protection

    Response

    200OK

    ok

    307Temporary Redirect

    Redirect to UI

    defaultError

    Error

    Handle the OIDC provider callback (browser).
    Copy
    curl -X GET 'http://localhost/auth/oidc/callback'
    const response = await fetch('http://localhost/auth/oidc/callback', {
  method: 'GET',
});

const data = await response.json();
    import requests

response = requests.get('http://localhost/auth/oidc/callback')
data = response.json()
    default
    Copy
    {
  "error": "Unauthorized",
  "errorCode": 401,
  "errorDescription": "you need to provide a valid access token or user credentials to access this api"
}
    Handle the OIDC provider callback (browser).
    Copy
    curl -X GET 'http://localhost/auth/oidc/callback'
    const response = await fetch('http://localhost/auth/oidc/callback', {
  method: 'GET',
});

const data = await response.json();
    import requests

response = requests.get('http://localhost/auth/oidc/callback')
data = response.json()
    default
    Copy
    {
  "error": "Unauthorized",
  "errorCode": 401,
  "errorDescription": "you need to provide a valid access token or user credentials to access this api"
}

    Start the OIDC flow to elevate an existing client session (browser).

    GET
    http://localhost/auth/oidc/elevate

    Redirects the user to the OIDC provider's authorization endpoint. After successful authentication, the referenced client session is elevated for the requested duration.

    Parameters

    idinteger<int64>requiredquery

    the client id to elevate

    durationSecondsintegerrequiredquery

    how long the elevation should last, in seconds

    Response

    302Found

    Redirect to OIDC provider

    defaultError

    Error

    Start the OIDC flow to elevate an existing client session (browser).
    Copy
    curl -X GET 'http://localhost/auth/oidc/elevate'
    const response = await fetch('http://localhost/auth/oidc/elevate', {
  method: 'GET',
});

const data = await response.json();
    import requests

response = requests.get('http://localhost/auth/oidc/elevate')
data = response.json()
    default
    Copy
    {
  "error": "Unauthorized",
  "errorCode": 401,
  "errorDescription": "you need to provide a valid access token or user credentials to access this api"
}
    Start the OIDC flow to elevate an existing client session (browser).
    Copy
    curl -X GET 'http://localhost/auth/oidc/elevate'
    const response = await fetch('http://localhost/auth/oidc/elevate', {
  method: 'GET',
});

const data = await response.json();
    import requests

response = requests.get('http://localhost/auth/oidc/elevate')
data = response.json()
    default
    Copy
    {
  "error": "Unauthorized",
  "errorCode": 401,
  "errorDescription": "you need to provide a valid access token or user credentials to access this api"
}

    Initiate the OIDC authorization flow for a native app.

    POST
    http://localhost/auth/oidc/external/authorize

    The app generates a PKCE code_verifier and code_challenge, then calls this endpoint. The server forwards the code_challenge to the OIDC provider and returns the authorization URL for the app to open in a browser.

    Body

    application/json

    Used to initiate the OIDC authorization flow for an external client.

    code_challengestringrequired

    The PKCE code challenge (S256).

    namestringrequired

    The client name to display in gotify.

    redirect_uristringrequired

    The app's redirect URI.

    Response

    200OKOIDCExternalAuthorizeResponse

    Ok

    defaultError

    Error

    Initiate the OIDC authorization flow for a native app.
    Copy
    curl -X POST 'http://localhost/auth/oidc/external/authorize' \
  -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \
  -d '{
    "code_challenge": "E9Melhoa2OwvFrEMTJguCHaoeK1t8URWbuGJSstw-cM",
    "name": "Android Phone",
    "redirect_uri": "gotify://oidc/callback"
  }'
    const response = await fetch('http://localhost/auth/oidc/external/authorize', {
  method: 'POST',
  headers: {
    'Content-Type': 'application/json',
  },
  body: JSON.stringify({
      "code_challenge": "E9Melhoa2OwvFrEMTJguCHaoeK1t8URWbuGJSstw-cM",
      "name": "Android Phone",
      "redirect_uri": "gotify://oidc/callback"
    }),
});

const data = await response.json();
    import requests

payload = {
  "code_challenge": "E9Melhoa2OwvFrEMTJguCHaoeK1t8URWbuGJSstw-cM",
  "name": "Android Phone",
  "redirect_uri": "gotify://oidc/callback"
}

response = requests.post('http://localhost/auth/oidc/external/authorize', json=payload)
data = response.json()
    Request Body
    Copy
    {
  "code_challenge": "E9Melhoa2OwvFrEMTJguCHaoeK1t8URWbuGJSstw-cM",
  "name": "Android Phone",
  "redirect_uri": "gotify://oidc/callback"
}
    Copy
    {
  "authorize_url": "https://auth.example.com/authorize?client_id=gotify&...",
  "state": "Android Phone:a1b2c3d4e5f6"
}
    {
  "error": "Unauthorized",
  "errorCode": 401,
  "errorDescription": "you need to provide a valid access token or user credentials to access this api"
}
    Initiate the OIDC authorization flow for a native app.
    Copy
    curl -X POST 'http://localhost/auth/oidc/external/authorize' \
  -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \
  -d '{
    "code_challenge": "E9Melhoa2OwvFrEMTJguCHaoeK1t8URWbuGJSstw-cM",
    "name": "Android Phone",
    "redirect_uri": "gotify://oidc/callback"
  }'
    const response = await fetch('http://localhost/auth/oidc/external/authorize', {
  method: 'POST',
  headers: {
    'Content-Type': 'application/json',
  },
  body: JSON.stringify({
      "code_challenge": "E9Melhoa2OwvFrEMTJguCHaoeK1t8URWbuGJSstw-cM",
      "name": "Android Phone",
      "redirect_uri": "gotify://oidc/callback"
    }),
});

const data = await response.json();
    import requests

payload = {
  "code_challenge": "E9Melhoa2OwvFrEMTJguCHaoeK1t8URWbuGJSstw-cM",
  "name": "Android Phone",
  "redirect_uri": "gotify://oidc/callback"
}

response = requests.post('http://localhost/auth/oidc/external/authorize', json=payload)
data = response.json()
    Request Body
    Copy
    {
  "code_challenge": "E9Melhoa2OwvFrEMTJguCHaoeK1t8URWbuGJSstw-cM",
  "name": "Android Phone",
  "redirect_uri": "gotify://oidc/callback"
}
    Copy
    {
  "authorize_url": "https://auth.example.com/authorize?client_id=gotify&...",
  "state": "Android Phone:a1b2c3d4e5f6"
}
    {
  "error": "Unauthorized",
  "errorCode": 401,
  "errorDescription": "you need to provide a valid access token or user credentials to access this api"
}

    Exchange an authorization code for a gotify client token.

    POST
    http://localhost/auth/oidc/external/token

    After the user authenticates with the OIDC provider and the app receives the authorization code via redirect, the app calls this endpoint with the code and PKCE code_verifier. The server exchanges the code with the OIDC provider and returns a gotify client token.

    Body

    application/json

    Used to exchange an authorization code for a gotify client token.

    codestringrequired

    The authorization code from the OIDC provider.

    code_verifierstringrequired

    The PKCE code verifier.

    statestringrequired

    The state from the authorize response.

    Response

    200OKOIDCExternalTokenResponse

    Ok

    defaultError

    Error

    Exchange an authorization code for a gotify client token.
    Copy
    curl -X POST 'http://localhost/auth/oidc/external/token' \
  -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \
  -d '{
    "code": "string",
    "code_verifier": "dBjftJeZ4CVP-mB92K27uhbUJU1p1r_wW1gFWFOEjXk",
    "state": "Android Phone:a1b2c3d4e5f6"
  }'
    const response = await fetch('http://localhost/auth/oidc/external/token', {
  method: 'POST',
  headers: {
    'Content-Type': 'application/json',
  },
  body: JSON.stringify({
      "code": "string",
      "code_verifier": "dBjftJeZ4CVP-mB92K27uhbUJU1p1r_wW1gFWFOEjXk",
      "state": "Android Phone:a1b2c3d4e5f6"
    }),
});

const data = await response.json();
    import requests

payload = {
  "code": "string",
  "code_verifier": "dBjftJeZ4CVP-mB92K27uhbUJU1p1r_wW1gFWFOEjXk",
  "state": "Android Phone:a1b2c3d4e5f6"
}

response = requests.post('http://localhost/auth/oidc/external/token', json=payload)
data = response.json()
    Request Body
    Copy
    {
  "code": "string",
  "code_verifier": "dBjftJeZ4CVP-mB92K27uhbUJU1p1r_wW1gFWFOEjXk",
  "state": "Android Phone:a1b2c3d4e5f6"
}
    Copy
    {
  "token": "CWH0wZ5r0Mbac.r",
  "user": {
    "admin": true,
    "createdAt": "2019-01-01T00:00:00Z",
    "id": 25,
    "name": "unicorn"
  }
}
    {
  "error": "Unauthorized",
  "errorCode": 401,
  "errorDescription": "you need to provide a valid access token or user credentials to access this api"
}
    Exchange an authorization code for a gotify client token.

  -d '{
    "code": "string",

  }'
    const response = await fetch('http://localhost/auth/oidc/external/token', {

    'Content-Type': 'application/json',
  },
  body: JSON.stringify({
      "code": "string",

    Start the OIDC login flow (browser).

    GET
    http://localhost/auth/oidc/login

    Redirects the user to the OIDC provider's authorization endpoint. After authentication, the provider redirects back to the callback endpoint.

    Parameters

    namestringrequiredquery

    the client name to create after login

    Response

    302Found

    Redirect to OIDC provider

    defaultError

    Error

    Start the OIDC login flow (browser).
    Copy
    curl -X GET 'http://localhost/auth/oidc/login'
    const response = await fetch('http://localhost/auth/oidc/login', {
  method: 'GET',
});

const data = await response.json();
    import requests

response = requests.get('http://localhost/auth/oidc/login')
data = response.json()
    default
    Copy
    {
  "error": "Unauthorized",
  "errorCode": 401,
  "errorDescription": "you need to provide a valid access token or user credentials to access this api"
}

    curl -X GET 'http://localhost/auth/oidc/login'
    const response = await fetch('http://localhost/auth/oidc/login', {

data = response.json()

  "error": "Unauthorized",
  "errorCode": 401,
  "errorDescription": "you need to provide a valid access token or user credentials to access this api"
}

    client

    Return all clients.

    GET
    http://localhost/client

    Response

    200OKArray<Client>

    Ok

    401UnauthorizedError

    Unauthorized

    403ForbiddenError

    Forbidden

    Authorization

    clientTokenAuthorizationHeaderapiKey in header

    Enter a client token with the Bearer prefix, e.g. Bearer Cxxxxxxxxxx.

    clientTokenHeaderapiKey in header
    clientTokenQueryapiKey in query
    basicAuthhttp (basic)
    Return all clients.
    Copy
    curl -X GET 'http://localhost/client'
    const response = await fetch('http://localhost/client', {
  method: 'GET',
});

const data = await response.json();
    import requests

response = requests.get('http://localhost/client')
data = response.json()
    Copy
    [
  {
    "createdAt": "2019-01-01T00:00:00Z",
    "elevatedUntil": "2024-01-15T09:30:00Z",
    "expiresAfterInactivitySeconds": 2592000,
    "expiresAt": "2019-01-01T00:00:00Z",
    "id": 5,
    "lastUsed": "2019-01-01T00:00:00Z",
    "name": "Android Phone",
    "token": "CWH0wZ5r0Mbac.r"
  }
]
    {
  "error": "Unauthorized",
  "errorCode": 401,
  "errorDescription": "you need to provide a valid access token or user credentials to access this api"
}
    {
  "error": "Unauthorized",
  "errorCode": 401,
  "errorDescription": "you need to provide a valid access token or user credentials to access this api"
}

    const response = await fetch('http://localhost/client', {
  method: 'GET',
});

const data = await response.json();
    import requests

response = requests.get('http://localhost/client')
data = response.json()
    Copy
    [
  {
    "createdAt": "2019-01-01T00:00:00Z",

}

    Create a client.

    POST
    http://localhost/client

    Body

    application/json

    the client to add

    Params allowed to create or update Clients.

    expiresAfterInactivitySecondsinteger<int64>

    The number of seconds of inactivity after which the client is removed. 0 (or omitted) means the client never expires.

    namestringrequired

    The client name

    Response

    200OKClient

    Ok

    400Bad RequestError

    Bad Request

    401UnauthorizedError

    Unauthorized

    403ForbiddenError

    Forbidden

    Authorization

    clientTokenAuthorizationHeaderapiKey in header

    Enter a client token with the Bearer prefix, e.g. Bearer Cxxxxxxxxxx.

    clientTokenHeaderapiKey in header
    clientTokenQueryapiKey in query
    basicAuthhttp (basic)
    Create a client.
    Copy
    curl -X POST 'http://localhost/client' \
  -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \
  -d '{
    "expiresAfterInactivitySeconds": 2592000,
    "name": "My Client"
  }'
    const response = await fetch('http://localhost/client', {
  method: 'POST',
  headers: {
    'Content-Type': 'application/json',
  },
  body: JSON.stringify({
      "expiresAfterInactivitySeconds": 2592000,
      "name": "My Client"
    }),
});

const data = await response.json();
    import requests

payload = {
  "expiresAfterInactivitySeconds": 2592000,
  "name": "My Client"
}

response = requests.post('http://localhost/client', json=payload)
data = response.json()
    Request Body
    Copy
    {
  "expiresAfterInactivitySeconds": 2592000,
  "name": "My Client"
}
    Copy
    {
  "createdAt": "2019-01-01T00:00:00Z",
  "elevatedUntil": "2024-01-15T09:30:00Z",
  "expiresAfterInactivitySeconds": 2592000,
  "expiresAt": "2019-01-01T00:00:00Z",
  "id": 5,
  "lastUsed": "2019-01-01T00:00:00Z",
  "name": "Android Phone",
  "token": "CWH0wZ5r0Mbac.r"
}
    {
  "error": "Unauthorized",
  "errorCode": 401,

    Create a client.
    Copy
    curl -X POST 'http://localhost/client' \
  -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \
  -d '{
    "expiresAfterInactivitySeconds": 2592000,
    "name": "My Client"
  }'
    const response = await fetch('http://localhost/client', {
  method: 'POST',
  headers: {
    'Content-Type': 'application/json',
  },
  body: JSON.stringify({
      "expiresAfterInactivitySeconds": 2592000,
      "name": "My Client"
    }),
});

const data = await response.json();
    import requests

payload = {
  "expiresAfterInactivitySeconds": 2592000,
  "name": "My Client"
}

response = requests.post('http://localhost/client', json=payload)
data = response.json()
    Request Body
    Copy
    {
  "expiresAfterInactivitySeconds": 2592000,
  "name": "My Client"
}
    Copy
    {
  "createdAt": "2019-01-01T00:00:00Z",
  "elevatedUntil": "2024-01-15T09:30:00Z",
  "expiresAfterInactivitySeconds": 2592000,
  "expiresAt": "2019-01-01T00:00:00Z",
  "id": 5,
  "lastUsed": "2019-01-01T00:00:00Z",
  "name": "Android Phone",
  "token": "CWH0wZ5r0Mbac.r"
}
    {
  "error": "Unauthorized",
  "errorCode": 401,
  "errorDescription": "you need to provide a valid access token or user credentials to access this api"
}
    {

  "errorCode": 401,
  "errorDescription": "you need to provide a valid access token or user credentials to access this api"
}
    {
  "error": "Unauthorized",
  "errorCode": 401,
  "errorDescription": "you need to provide a valid access token or user credentials to access this api"
}

    Update a client.

    PUT
    http://localhost/client/{id}

    Body

    application/json

    the client to update

    Params allowed to create or update Clients.

    expiresAfterInactivitySecondsinteger<int64>

    The number of seconds of inactivity after which the client is removed. 0 (or omitted) means the client never expires.

    namestringrequired

    The client name

    Parameters

    idinteger<int64>requiredpath

    the client id

    Response

    200OKClient

    Ok

    400Bad RequestError

    Bad Request

    401UnauthorizedError

    Unauthorized

    403ForbiddenError

    Forbidden

    404Not FoundError

    Not Found

    Authorization

    clientTokenAuthorizationHeaderapiKey in header

    Enter a client token with the Bearer prefix, e.g. Bearer Cxxxxxxxxxx.

    clientTokenHeaderapiKey in header
    clientTokenQueryapiKey in query
    basicAuthhttp (basic)

  -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \

    "name": "My Client"
  }'

  method: 'PUT',

  },
  body: JSON.stringify({
      "expiresAfterInactivitySeconds": 2592000,
      "name": "My Client"
    }),
});

const data = await response.json();

    http://localhost/client/{id}

    Requires elevated authentication.

    200OK

    Ok

    Bad Request

    Enter a client token with the Bearer prefix, e.g. Bearer Cxxxxxxxxxx.

    clientTokenQueryapiKey in query

    Elevate a client session.

    POST
    http://localhost/client/{id}/elevate

    Requires elevated authentication.

    Body

    application/json

    the elevation request

    durationSecondsinteger<int64>required

    How long the elevation should last, in seconds.

    Parameters

    idinteger<int64>requiredpath

    the client id

    Response

    204No Content

    Ok

    400Bad RequestError

    Bad Request

    401UnauthorizedError

    Unauthorized

    404Not FoundError

    Not Found

    Authorization

    clientTokenAuthorizationHeaderapiKey in header

    Enter a client token with the Bearer prefix, e.g. Bearer Cxxxxxxxxxx.

    clientTokenHeaderapiKey in header
    clientTokenQueryapiKey in query
    basicAuthhttp (basic)
    Elevate a client session.
    Copy
    curl -X POST 'http://localhost/client/{id}/elevate' \
  -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \
  -d '{
    "durationSeconds": 900
  }'
    const response = await fetch('http://localhost/client/{id}/elevate', {
  method: 'POST',
  headers: {
    'Content-Type': 'application/json',
  },
  body: JSON.stringify({
      "durationSeconds": 900
    }),
});

const data = await response.json();
    import requests

payload = {
  "durationSeconds": 900
}

response = requests.post('http://localhost/client/{id}/elevate', json=payload)
data = response.json()

  "durationSeconds": 900
}

    Create a user.

    POST
    http://localhost/user

    With enabled registration: non admin users can be created without authentication. With disabled registrations: users can only be created by admin users.

    Requires elevated authentication.

    Body

    application/json

    the user to add

    Used for user creation.

    adminbooleanrequired

    If the user is an administrator.

    namestringrequired

    The user name. For login.

    passstringrequired

    The user password. For login.

    Response

    200OKUser

    Ok

    400Bad RequestError

    Bad Request

    401UnauthorizedError

    Unauthorized

    403ForbiddenError

    Forbidden

    Authorization

    clientTokenAuthorizationHeaderapiKey in header

    Enter a client token with the Bearer prefix, e.g. Bearer Cxxxxxxxxxx.

    clientTokenHeaderapiKey in header
    clientTokenQueryapiKey in query
    basicAuthhttp (basic)
    Create a user.
    Copy
    curl -X POST 'http://localhost/user' \
  -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \
  -d '{
    "admin": true,
    "name": "unicorn",
    "pass": "nrocinu"
  }'
    const response = await fetch('http://localhost/user', {
  method: 'POST',
  headers: {
    'Content-Type': 'application/json',
  },
  body: JSON.stringify({
      "admin": true,
      "name": "unicorn",
      "pass": "nrocinu"
    }),
});

const data = await response.json();
    import requests

payload = {
  "admin": True,
  "name": "unicorn",
  "pass": "nrocinu"
}

response = requests.post('http://localhost/user', json=payload)
data = response.json()

  "admin": true,
  "name": "unicorn",
  "pass": "nrocinu"
}

const data = await response.json();

response = requests.get('http://localhost/user/{id}')
data = response.json()
    Copy
    {
  "admin": true,
  "createdAt": "2019-01-01T00:00:00Z",
  "id": 25,
  "name": "unicorn"
}
    {
  "error": "Unauthorized",

    Update a user.

    POST
    http://localhost/user/{id}

    Requires elevated authentication.

    Body

    application/json

    the updated user

    Used for updating a user.

    adminbooleanrequired

    If the user is an administrator.

    namestringrequired

    The user name. For login.

    passstring

    The user password. For login. Empty for using old password

    Parameters

    idinteger<int64>requiredpath

    the user id

    Response

    200OKUser

    Ok

    400Bad RequestError

    Bad Request

    401UnauthorizedError

    Unauthorized

    403ForbiddenError

    Forbidden

    404Not FoundError

    Not Found

    Authorization

    clientTokenAuthorizationHeaderapiKey in header

    Enter a client token with the Bearer prefix, e.g. Bearer Cxxxxxxxxxx.

    clientTokenHeaderapiKey in header
    clientTokenQueryapiKey in query
    basicAuthhttp (basic)
    Update a user.
    Copy
    curl -X POST 'http://localhost/user/{id}' \
  -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \
  -d '{
    "admin": true,
    "name": "unicorn",
    "pass": "nrocinu"
  }'
    const response = await fetch('http://localhost/user/{id}', {
  method: 'POST',
  headers: {
    'Content-Type': 'application/json',
  },
  body: JSON.stringify({
      "admin": true,
      "name": "unicorn",
      "pass": "nrocinu"
    }),
});

const data = await response.json();
    import requests

payload = {
  "admin": True,
  "name": "unicorn",
  "pass": "nrocinu"
}

response = requests.post('http://localhost/user/{id}', json=payload)
data = response.json()
    Request Body
    Copy
    {
  "admin": true,
  "name": "unicorn",
  "pass": "nrocinu"
}
    Copy
    {
  "admin": true,
  "createdAt": "2019-01-01T00:00:00Z",
  "id": 25,
  "name": "unicorn"
}
    {
  "error": "Unauthorized",
  "errorCode": 401,
  "errorDescription": "you need to provide a valid access token or user credentials to access this api"
}
    {
  "error": "Unauthorized",
  "errorCode": 401,
  "errorDescription": "you need to provide a valid access token or user credentials to access this api"
}
    {
  "error": "Unauthorized",
  "errorCode": 401,
  "errorDescription": "you need to provide a valid access token or user credentials to access this api"
}
    {
  "error": "Unauthorized",
  "errorCode": 401,
  "errorDescription": "you need to provide a valid access token or user credentials to access this api"
}

data = response.json()

  "oidc": true,
  "register": true,
  "version": "5.2.6"
}

    "enabled": true,
    "id": 25,
    "license": "MIT",
    "modulePath": "github.com/gotify/server/plugin/example/echo",

    "token": "P1234",
    "website": "gotify.net"

    Forbidden

    404Not FoundError

    Not Found

    500Internal Server ErrorError

    Internal Server Error

    Authorization

    clientTokenAuthorizationHeaderapiKey in header

    Enter a client token with the Bearer prefix, e.g. Bearer Cxxxxxxxxxx.

    clientTokenHeaderapiKey in header
    clientTokenQueryapiKey in query
    basicAuthhttp (basic)
    Enable a plugin.
    Copy
    curl -X POST 'http://localhost/plugin/{id}/enable'
    const response = await fetch('http://localhost/plugin/{id}/enable', {
  method: 'POST',
});

const data = await response.json();
    import requests

response = requests.post('http://localhost/plugin/{id}/enable')
data = response.json()
    Copy
    {
  "error": "Unauthorized",
  "errorCode": 401,
  "errorDescription": "you need to provide a valid access token or user credentials to access this api"
}
    {
  "error": "Unauthorized",
  "errorCode": 401,
  "errorDescription": "you need to provide a valid access token or user credentials to access this api"
}
    {
  "error": "Unauthorized",
  "errorCode": 401,
  "errorDescription": "you need to provide a valid access token or user credentials to access this api"
}
    {
  "error": "Unauthorized",
  "errorCode": 401,
  "errorDescription": "you need to provide a valid access token or user credentials to access this api"
}
    Enable a plugin.
    Copy
    curl -X POST 'http://localhost/plugin/{id}/enable'
    const response = await fetch('http://localhost/plugin/{id}/enable', {
  method: 'POST',
});

const data = await response.json();
    import requests

response = requests.post('http://localhost/plugin/{id}/enable')
data = response.json()
    Copy
    {
  "error": "Unauthorized",
  "errorCode": 401,
  "errorDescription": "you need to provide a valid access token or user credentials to access this api"
}
    {
  "error": "Unauthorized",
  "errorCode": 401,
  "errorDescription": "you need to provide a valid access token or user credentials to access this api"
}
    {
  "error": "Unauthorized",
  "errorCode": 401,
  "errorDescription": "you need to provide a valid access token or user credentials to access this api"
}
    {
  "error": "Unauthorized",
  "errorCode": 401,
  "errorDescription": "you need to provide a valid access token or user credentials to access this api"
}

    Models

    Application

    object

    The Application holds information about an app which can send notifications.

    createdAtstring<date-time>requiredread only

    The date the application was created.

    defaultPriorityinteger<int64>

    The default priority of messages sent by this application. Defaults to 0.

    descriptionstringrequired

    The description of the application.

    idinteger<int64>requiredread only

    The application id.

    imagestringrequiredread only

    The image of the application.

    internalbooleanrequiredread only

    Whether the application is an internal application. Internal applications should not be deleted.

    lastUsedstring<date-time>read only

    The last time the application token was used.

    namestringrequired

    The application name. This is how the application should be displayed to the user.

    sortKeystringrequired

    The sort key of this application. Uses fractional indexing.

    tokenstringrequiredread only

    The application token. Can be used as appToken. See Authentication.

    Example
    Copy
    {
  "createdAt": "2019-01-01T00:00:00Z",
  "defaultPriority": 4,
  "description": "Backup server for the interwebs",
  "id": 5,
  "image": "image/image.jpeg",
  "internal": false,
  "lastUsed": "2019-01-01T00:00:00Z",
  "name": "Backup Server",
  "sortKey": "a1",
  "token": "AWH0wZ5r0Mbac.r"
}
    Example
    Copy
    {
  "createdAt": "2019-01-01T00:00:00Z",
  "defaultPriority": 4,
  "description": "Backup server for the interwebs",
  "id": 5,
  "image": "image/image.jpeg",
  "internal": false,
  "lastUsed": "2019-01-01T00:00:00Z",
  "name": "Backup Server",
  "sortKey": "a1",
  "token": "AWH0wZ5r0Mbac.r"
}

    ApplicationParams

    object

    Params allowed to create or update Applications.

    defaultPriorityinteger<int64>

    The default priority of messages sent by this application. Defaults to 0.

    descriptionstring

    The description of the application.

    namestringrequired

    The application name. This is how the application should be displayed to the user.

    sortKeystring

    The sortKey for the application. Uses fractional indexing.

    Example
    Copy
    {
  "defaultPriority": 5,
  "description": "Backup server for the interwebs",
  "name": "Backup Server",
  "sortKey": "a1"
}
    Example
    Copy
    {
  "defaultPriority": 5,
  "description": "Backup server for the interwebs",
  "name": "Backup Server",
  "sortKey": "a1"
}

    Client

    object

    The Client holds information about a device which can receive notifications (and other stuff).

    createdAtstring<date-time>requiredread only

    The date the client was created.

    elevatedUntilstring<date-time>read only

    The time until which this client's session is elevated.

    expiresAfterInactivitySecondsinteger<int64>

    The number of seconds of inactivity after which the client is removed. 0 means the client never expires.

    expiresAtstring<date-time>read only

    The time at which this client will expire due to inactivity, or null if it never expires.

    idinteger<int64>requiredread only

    The client id.

    lastUsedstring<date-time>read only

    The last time the client token was used.

    namestringrequired

    The client name. This is how the client should be displayed to the user.

    tokenstringrequiredread only

    The client token. Can be used as clientToken. See Authentication.

    Example
    Copy
    {
  "createdAt": "2019-01-01T00:00:00Z",
  "elevatedUntil": "2024-01-15T09:30:00Z",
  "expiresAfterInactivitySeconds": 2592000,
  "expiresAt": "2019-01-01T00:00:00Z",
  "id": 5,
  "lastUsed": "2019-01-01T00:00:00Z",
  "name": "Android Phone",
  "token": "CWH0wZ5r0Mbac.r"
}
    Example
    Copy
    {
  "createdAt": "2019-01-01T00:00:00Z",
  "elevatedUntil": "2024-01-15T09:30:00Z",
  "expiresAfterInactivitySeconds": 2592000,
  "expiresAt": "2019-01-01T00:00:00Z",
  "id": 5,
  "lastUsed": "2019-01-01T00:00:00Z",
  "name": "Android Phone",
  "token": "CWH0wZ5r0Mbac.r"
}

    ClientParams

    object

    Params allowed to create or update Clients.

    expiresAfterInactivitySecondsinteger<int64>

    The number of seconds of inactivity after which the client is removed. 0 (or omitted) means the client never expires.

    namestringrequired

    The client name

    Example
    Copy
    {
  "expiresAfterInactivitySeconds": 2592000,
  "name": "My Client"
}
    Example
    Copy
    {
  "expiresAfterInactivitySeconds": 2592000,
  "name": "My Client"
}

    CreateUserExternal

    object

    Used for user creation.

    adminbooleanrequired

    If the user is an administrator.

    namestringrequired

    The user name. For login.

    passstringrequired

    The user password. For login.

    Example
    Copy
    {
  "admin": true,
  "name": "unicorn",
  "pass": "nrocinu"
}
    Example
    Copy
    {
  "admin": true,
  "name": "unicorn",
  "pass": "nrocinu"
}

    CurrentUser

    object

    CurrentUserExternal Model

    adminbooleanrequired

    If the user is an administrator.

    clientIdinteger<int64>read only

    The client id of the current session.

    createdAtstring<date-time>requiredread only

    The date the user was created.

    elevatedUntilstring<date-time>read only

    The time until which the session is elevated.

    idinteger<int64>requiredread only

    The user id.

    namestringrequired

    The user name. For login.

    Example
    Copy
    {
  "admin": true,
  "clientId": 5,
  "createdAt": "2019-01-01T00:00:00Z",
  "elevatedUntil": "2024-01-15T09:30:00Z",
  "id": 25,
  "name": "unicorn"
}
    Example
    Copy
    {
  "admin": true,
  "clientId": 5,
  "createdAt": "2019-01-01T00:00:00Z",
  "elevatedUntil": "2024-01-15T09:30:00Z",
  "id": 25,
  "name": "unicorn"
}

    ElevateRequest

    object
    durationSecondsinteger<int64>required

    How long the elevation should last, in seconds.

    Example
    Copy
    {
  "durationSeconds": 900
}
    Example
    Copy
    {
  "durationSeconds": 900
}

    Error

    object

    The Error contains error relevant information.

    errorstringrequired

    The general error message

    errorCodeinteger<int64>required

    The http error code.

    errorDescriptionstringrequired

    The http error code.

    Example
    Copy
    {
  "error": "Unauthorized",
  "errorCode": 401,
  "errorDescription": "you need to provide a valid access token or user credentials to access this api"
}
    Example
    Copy
    {
  "error": "Unauthorized",
  "errorCode": 401,
  "errorDescription": "you need to provide a valid access token or user credentials to access this api"
}

    GotifyInfo

    object

    GotifyInfo Model

    oidcbooleanrequired

    If oidc is enabled.

    registerbooleanrequired

    If registration is enabled.

    versionstringrequired

    The current version.

    Example
    Copy
    {
  "oidc": true,
  "register": true,
  "version": "5.2.6"
}
    Example
    Copy
    {
  "oidc": true,
  "register": true,
  "version": "5.2.6"
}

    Health

    object

    Health represents how healthy the application is.

    databasestringrequired

    The health of the database connection.

    healthstringrequired

    The health of the overall application.

    Example
    Copy
    {
  "database": "green",
  "health": "green"
}
    Example
    Copy
    {
  "database": "green",
  "health": "green"
}

    Message

    object

    The MessageExternal holds information about a message which was sent by an Application.

    appidinteger<int64>requiredread only

    The application id that send this message.

    datestring<date-time>requiredread only

    The date the message was created.

    extrasobject

    The extra data sent along the message.

    The extra fields are stored in a key-value scheme. Only accepted in CreateMessage requests with application/json content-type.

    The keys should be in the following format: <top-namespace>::[<sub-namespace>::]<action>

    These namespaces are reserved and might be used in the official clients: gotify android ios web server client. Do not use them for other purposes.

    idinteger<int64>requiredread only

    The message id.

    messagestringrequired

    The message. Markdown (excluding html) is allowed.

    priorityinteger<int64>

    The priority of the message. If unset, then the default priority of the application will be used.

    titlestring

    The title of the message.

    Example
    Copy
    {
  "appid": 5,
  "date": "2018-02-27T19:36:10.5045044+01:00",
  "extras": {
    "home::appliances::lighting::on": {
      "brightness": 15
    },
    "home::appliances::thermostat::change_temperature": {
      "temperature": 23
    }
  },
  "id": 25,
  "message": "**Backup** was successfully finished.",
  "priority": 2,
  "title": "Backup"
}
    Example
    Copy
    {
  "appid": 5,
  "date": "2018-02-27T19:36:10.5045044+01:00",
  "extras": {
    "home::appliances::lighting::on": {
      "brightness": 15
    },
    "home::appliances::thermostat::change_temperature": {
      "temperature": 23
    }
  },
  "id": 25,
  "message": "**Backup** was successfully finished.",
  "priority": 2,
  "title": "Backup"
}

    OIDCExternalAuthorizeRequest

    object

    Used to initiate the OIDC authorization flow for an external client.

    code_challengestringrequired

    The PKCE code challenge (S256).

    namestringrequired

    The client name to display in gotify.

    redirect_uristringrequired

    The app's redirect URI.

    Example
    Copy
    {
  "code_challenge": "E9Melhoa2OwvFrEMTJguCHaoeK1t8URWbuGJSstw-cM",
  "name": "Android Phone",
  "redirect_uri": "gotify://oidc/callback"
}
    Example
    Copy
    {
  "code_challenge": "E9Melhoa2OwvFrEMTJguCHaoeK1t8URWbuGJSstw-cM",
  "name": "Android Phone",
  "redirect_uri": "gotify://oidc/callback"
}

    OIDCExternalAuthorizeResponse

    object

    Returned after initiating the OIDC authorization flow.

    authorize_urlstringrequired

    The URL to open in the browser to authenticate with the OIDC provider.

    statestringrequired

    The state parameter to send back with the token exchange request.

    Example
    Copy
    {
  "authorize_url": "https://auth.example.com/authorize?client_id=gotify&...",
  "state": "Android Phone:a1b2c3d4e5f6"
}
    Example
    Copy
    {
  "authorize_url": "https://auth.example.com/authorize?client_id=gotify&...",
  "state": "Android Phone:a1b2c3d4e5f6"
}

    OIDCExternalTokenRequest

    object

    Used to exchange an authorization code for a gotify client token.

    codestringrequired

    The authorization code from the OIDC provider.

    code_verifierstringrequired

    The PKCE code verifier.

    statestringrequired

    The state from the authorize response.

    Example
    Copy
    {
  "code": "string",
  "code_verifier": "dBjftJeZ4CVP-mB92K27uhbUJU1p1r_wW1gFWFOEjXk",
  "state": "Android Phone:a1b2c3d4e5f6"
}
    Example
    Copy
    {
  "code": "string",
  "code_verifier": "dBjftJeZ4CVP-mB92K27uhbUJU1p1r_wW1gFWFOEjXk",
  "state": "Android Phone:a1b2c3d4e5f6"
}

    OIDCExternalTokenResponse

    object

    Returned after a successful token exchange.

    tokenstringrequired

    The gotify client token for API authentication.

    userUserrequired

    The User holds information about permission and other stuff.

    Show child attributes
    adminbooleanrequired

    If the user is an administrator.

    createdAtstring<date-time>requiredread only

    The date the user was created.

    idinteger<int64>requiredread only

    The user id.

    namestringrequired

    The user name. For login.

    Example
    Copy
    {
  "token": "CWH0wZ5r0Mbac.r",
  "user": {
    "admin": true,
    "createdAt": "2019-01-01T00:00:00Z",
    "id": 25,
    "name": "unicorn"
  }
}
    Example
    Copy
    {
  "token": "CWH0wZ5r0Mbac.r",
  "user": {
    "admin": true,
    "createdAt": "2019-01-01T00:00:00Z",
    "id": 25,
    "name": "unicorn"
  }
}

    PagedMessages

    object

    Wrapper for the paging and the messages.

    messagesArray<Message>requiredread only

    The messages.

    Show child attributes
    appidinteger<int64>requiredread only

    The application id that send this message.

    datestring<date-time>requiredread only

    The date the message was created.

    extrasobject

    The extra data sent along the message.

    The extra fields are stored in a key-value scheme. Only accepted in CreateMessage requests with application/json content-type.

    The keys should be in the following format: <top-namespace>::[<sub-namespace>::]<action>

    These namespaces are reserved and might be used in the official clients: gotify android ios web server client. Do not use them for other purposes.

    idinteger<int64>requiredread only

    The message id.

    messagestringrequired

    The message. Markdown (excluding html) is allowed.

    priorityinteger<int64>

    The priority of the message. If unset, then the default priority of the application will be used.

    titlestring

    The title of the message.

    pagingPagingrequired

    The Paging holds information about the limit and making requests to the next page.

    Show child attributes
    limitinteger<int64>[1, 200]requiredread only

    The limit of the messages for the current request.

    nextstringread only

    The request url for the next page. Empty/Null when no next page is available.

    sinceinteger<int64>>= 0requiredread only

    The ID of the last message returned in the current request. Use this as alternative to the next link.

    sizeinteger<int64>requiredread only

    The amount of messages that got returned in the current request.

    Example
    Copy
    {
  "messages": [
    {
      "appid": 5,
      "date": "2018-02-27T19:36:10.5045044+01:00",
      "extras": {
        "home::appliances::lighting::on": {
          "brightness": 15
        },
        "home::appliances::thermostat::change_temperature": {
          "temperature": 23
        }
      },
      "id": 25,
      "message": "**Backup** was successfully finished.",
      "priority": 2,
      "title": "Backup"
    }
  ],
  "paging": {
    "limit": 123,
    "next": "http://example.com/message?limit=50&since=123456",
    "since": 5,
    "size": 5
  }
}
    Example
    Copy
    {
  "messages": [
    {
      "appid": 5,
      "date": "2018-02-27T19:36:10.5045044+01:00",
      "extras": {
        "home::appliances::lighting::on": {
          "brightness": 15
        },
        "home::appliances::thermostat::change_temperature": {
          "temperature": 23
        }
      },
      "id": 25,
      "message": "**Backup** was successfully finished.",
      "priority": 2,
      "title": "Backup"
    }
  ],
  "paging": {
    "limit": 123,
    "next": "http://example.com/message?limit=50&since=123456",
    "since": 5,
    "size": 5
  }
}

    Paging

    object

    The Paging holds information about the limit and making requests to the next page.

    limitinteger<int64>[1, 200]requiredread only

    The limit of the messages for the current request.

    nextstringread only

    The request url for the next page. Empty/Null when no next page is available.

    sinceinteger<int64>>= 0requiredread only

    The ID of the last message returned in the current request. Use this as alternative to the next link.

    sizeinteger<int64>requiredread only

    The amount of messages that got returned in the current request.

    Example
    Copy
    {
  "limit": 123,
  "next": "http://example.com/message?limit=50&since=123456",
  "since": 5,
  "size": 5
}
    Example
    Copy
    {
  "limit": 123,
  "next": "http://example.com/message?limit=50&since=123456",
  "since": 5,
  "size": 5
}

    PluginConf

    object

    Holds information about a plugin instance for one user.

    authorstringread only

    The author of the plugin.

    capabilitiesArray<string>required

    Capabilities the plugin provides

    createdAtstring<date-time>requiredread only

    The date the plugin was created.

    enabledbooleanrequired

    Whether the plugin instance is enabled.

    idinteger<int64>requiredread only

    The plugin id.

    licensestringread only

    The license of the plugin.

    modulePathstringrequiredread only

    The module path of the plugin.

    namestringrequiredread only

    The plugin name.

    tokenstringrequired

    The user name. For login.

    websitestringread only

    The website of the plugin.

    Example
    Copy
    {
  "author": "jmattheis",
  "capabilities": [
    "webhook",
    "display"
  ],
  "createdAt": "2019-01-01T00:00:00Z",
  "enabled": true,
  "id": 25,
  "license": "MIT",
  "modulePath": "github.com/gotify/server/plugin/example/echo",
  "name": "RSS poller",
  "token": "P1234",
  "website": "gotify.net"
}
    Example
    Copy
    {
  "author": "jmattheis",
  "capabilities": [
    "webhook",
    "display"
  ],
  "createdAt": "2019-01-01T00:00:00Z",
  "enabled": true,
  "id": 25,
  "license": "MIT",
  "modulePath": "github.com/gotify/server/plugin/example/echo",
  "name": "RSS poller",
  "token": "P1234",
  "website": "gotify.net"
}

    UpdateUserExternal

    object

    Used for updating a user.

    adminbooleanrequired

    If the user is an administrator.

    namestringrequired

    The user name. For login.

    passstring

    The user password. For login. Empty for using old password

    Example
    Copy
    {
  "admin": true,
  "name": "unicorn",
  "pass": "nrocinu"
}
    Example
    Copy
    {
  "admin": true,
  "name": "unicorn",
  "pass": "nrocinu"
}

    User

    object

    The User holds information about permission and other stuff.

    adminbooleanrequired

    If the user is an administrator.

    createdAtstring<date-time>requiredread only

    The date the user was created.

    idinteger<int64>requiredread only

    The user id.

    namestringrequired

    The user name. For login.

    Example
    Copy
    {
  "admin": true,
  "createdAt": "2019-01-01T00:00:00Z",
  "id": 25,
  "name": "unicorn"
}
    Example
    Copy
    {
  "admin": true,
  "createdAt": "2019-01-01T00:00:00Z",
  "id": 25,
  "name": "unicorn"
}

    UserPass

    object

    The Password for updating the user.

    passstringrequired

    The user password. For login.

    Example
    Copy
    {
  "pass": "nrocinu"
}
    Example
    Copy
    {
  "pass": "nrocinu"
}

    VersionInfo

    object

    VersionInfo Model

    buildDatestringrequired

    The date on which this binary was built.

    commitstringrequired

    The git commit hash on which this binary was built.

    versionstringrequired

    The current version.

    Example
    Copy
    {
  "buildDate": "2018-02-27T19:36:10.5045044+01:00",
  "commit": "ae9512b6b6feea56a110d59a3353ea3b9c293864",
  "version": "5.2.6"
}
    Example
    Copy
    {
  "buildDate": "2018-02-27T19:36:10.5045044+01:00",
  "commit": "ae9512b6b6feea56a110d59a3353ea3b9c293864",
  "version": "5.2.6"
}
    Built with
    ↑↓ navigate↵ selectesc close
